name: Lex Humphries
abstract: Lex Humphries (August 22, 1936 – July 11, 1994) was an American jazz drummer. He worked with two musicians known for mixing world music with jazz: Sun Ra and Yusef Lateef.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Sun Ra and His Space Arkestra

about_quotes.speaker: Junior Mance Part I
about_quotes.evidence: I used Dizzy’s drummer, a youngster, this guy was only like nineteen years old, named Lex Humphries. He was the drummer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Junior Mance Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, New York City, New York, July 27, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Karl Berger
about_quotes.evidence: And in those bands played a few jazz musicians who later became pretty well known, such as Cedar Walton or Lex Humphries and Don Ellis. ... Because we literally played with some of the best musicians in the world
about_quotes.doc_title: Karl Berger interviewed by Monk Rowe, Woodstock, New York, August 11, 2014

about_quotes.speaker: Cedar Walton
about_quotes.evidence: We became very good friends... me and Lex Humphries would go up … sometimes he had his old drum set with him. We'd visit him unannounced in his apartment
about_quotes.doc_title: Cedar Walton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: And Ben Tucker and Lex Humphries. I didn’t play. Joe Zawinul, who was with Dinah Washington at the time. I didn’t play. I just went to observe.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Tyner McCoy
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Lex Humphries. >> [INTERVIEWEE] Lex Humphries, yeah (laughs). Don’t put that in. Erase that please.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tyner McCoy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Junior Mance Part II
about_quotes.evidence: In fact Dizzy’s rhythm section, Sam and the drummer at the time named Lex Humphries.
about_quotes.doc_title: Junior Mance Part II interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 18, 1999 [interview 2 of 2]
